description_long: This is a square white plate with a black rim, featuring a visually appealing arrangement of food items. At the center sits a dome-shaped mound of mixed vegetable rice, garnished with a small sprig of green herb. To one side, there is a slice of golden-brown garlic bread, while the opposite side displays a colorful medley of sautéed vegetables including broccoli, carrots, and red peppers. A portion of creamy white sauce, possibly mashed potatoes or a gratin, is placed near the rice, topped with a green garnish. Along one edge of the plate, a vibrant line of shredded purple cabbage, carrots, and other salad vegetables adds a decorative touch. The plate is clean and the food is neatly presented, suggesting a restaurant or catered meal.
description: A square white plate with a black rim, artfully arranged with rice, garlic bread, sautéed vegetables, a creamy side, and a colorful salad garnish.
description_view_0: The rice mound is centered, with garlic bread on the left, vegetables on the right, and a colorful salad garnish along the far edge.
description_view_1: The garlic bread is most prominent, with the rice mound and creamy side in the foreground and the salad garnish trailing along the left edge.
description_view_2: The rice is central, with the garlic bread on the right, vegetables on the left, and the salad garnish running along the near edge.
description_view_3: The garlic bread is closest, with the rice and vegetables behind it and the salad garnish visible along the back edge.
